title: AI_OS Orchestration Schema Index
description: Machine-readable v0.1.1 index for AI_OS orchestration schema contract files. This index is documentation and discovery metadata only; it does not execute, approve, validate, commit, push, deploy, or mutate runtime state.

contracts.name: README
contracts.purpose: Folder purpose and safety boundary.

contracts.name: EVENT_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Plain-English orchestration event family contract.

contracts.name: STATE_PROJECTION_RULES
contracts.purpose: State projection rules for local-first orchestration evidence.

contracts.name: WORKER_REGISTRY_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Worker registry structure.

contracts.name: WORKER_PROFILE_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Worker profile-set and capability structure.

contracts.name: WORKER_INBOX_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Worker inbox task assignment records.

contracts.name: WORK_PACKET_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Work packet structure with current field aliases.

contracts.name: COMMAND_QUEUE_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Command queue entries with items/commands aliases.

contracts.name: command_request
contracts.purpose: Governed command request contract for future preview, approval, and runner handoff metadata.

contracts.name: command_audit_ledger
contracts.purpose: Append-only command audit ledger entry contract for preview and approved execution receipts.

contracts.name: command_runner_preview
contracts.purpose: Read-only command runner preview contract. It records safety evidence only and grants no execution authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_WORK_LEDGER_EVENT.v1
contracts.purpose: Python supervisor work-ledger event contract. Evidence only; grants no execution or approval authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_TELEMETRY_WRITE_RECEIPT.v1
contracts.purpose: Python supervisor telemetry write/preview receipt contract. Evidence only; grants no telemetry mutation authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_MORNING_BRIEF_SYNTHESIS.v1
contracts.purpose: DRY_RUN Morning Brief synthesis contract for existing orchestration evidence.

contracts.name: AIOS_MORNING_BRIEF_FILE.v1
contracts.purpose: Python supervisor Morning Brief file contract for approved evidence persistence.

contracts.name: AIOS_BRIEF_WRITE_RECEIPT.v1
contracts.purpose: Python supervisor Morning Brief write/preview receipt contract.

contracts.name: AIOS_FRESHNESS_SUMMARY.v1
contracts.purpose: Freshness summary contract for read-only evidence age classification.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_RISK_CLASSIFICATION.v1
contracts.purpose: Packet risk classification contract for read-only route and safety evidence.

contracts.name: AIOS_EVIDENCE_MANIFEST.v1
contracts.purpose: Read-only evidence manifest summary contract for Morning Brief source discovery.

contracts.name: AIOS_SELF_AUDIT_LOOP_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only self-audit loop result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, packet generation, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_SELF_DEVELOPMENT_PACKET_ROUTER_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only self-development packet router result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, packet generation, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_VALIDATOR_EVIDENCE_ROUTER_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only validator/evidence router result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, packet generation, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_DAY_NIGHT_READINESS_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only day/night readiness result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, packet generation, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_GOVERNED_SELF_DEVELOPMENT_LOOP_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only governed self-development loop result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, packet generation, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_APPROVAL_SOS_HARD_GATE_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only approval/SOS hard-gate result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_GOVERNED_SELF_DEVELOPMENT_SOAK_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only governed autonomy soak result contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_FULL_AUTONOMY_SUPERVISION_STATE_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only full-autonomy supervision state contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_FULL_AUTONOMY_ACTIVATION_GATE_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only full-autonomy activation gate contract. Evidence only; grants no APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, worker, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_FULL_AUTONOMY_WORKER_POSTURE_BRIDGE_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only full-autonomy worker posture bridge contract. Evidence only; grants no worker launch, APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_FULL_AUTONOMY_WORKER_LAUNCH_PREFLIGHT_GATE_RESULT.v1
contracts.purpose: Console-only full-autonomy worker launch preflight gate contract. Evidence only; grants no worker launch, APPLY, approval, queue, lock, relay, runtime, scheduler, broker, trading, commit, push, PR, or merge authority.

contracts.name: APPROVAL_INBOX_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Optional approval inbox records.

contracts.name: APPLY_APPROVAL_GATE_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Apply approval gate records with current aliases.

contracts.name: VALIDATOR_OUTPUT_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Validator output records.

contracts.name: orchestration_result_contract
contracts.purpose: Shared read-only result adapter shape for validators, approvals, commit-package planners, recommendations, and supervisor reports.

contracts.name: COMMIT_PACKAGE_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Commit package manifest and recommendation records.

contracts.name: LOCK_REGISTRY_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Registry-wrapper and single-lock file/path records.

contracts.name: RUNTIME_VISIBILITY_SCHEMA
contracts.purpose: Dashboard and runtime API visibility read model.

contracts.name: AIOS_ORCHESTRATION_PACKET.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for the one canonical AI_OS packet contract. Defines the stable work request a worker, validator, dashboard, and approval gate can all understand.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_APPROVAL.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for approval metadata attached to a packet or approval inbox item.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_RUNTIME_STATE.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for volatile packet state. Runtime state changes over time and should not replace the durable packet contract.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_LOCK.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for packet and worker path ownership locks.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_VALIDATOR.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for one validator entry attached to a canonical packet.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_ADAPTER_REPORT.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for read-only reports that explain how legacy packet shapes map into the canonical packet contract.

contracts.name: AIOS_PACKET_READ_MODEL.v1
contracts.purpose: Foundation schema stub for display-safe packet summaries used by dashboards and operator views.

contracts.name: AIOS_STRATEGIC_CAMPAIGN_REGISTRY.v1
contracts.purpose: Strategic campaign registry schema for AI_OS campaign planning authority.

contracts.name: overnight_supervisor
contracts.purpose: Overnight supervisor report schema for repo health, packet flow, validator, and approval evidence.

contracts.name: AIOS_SUPERVISOR_QUEUE.v1
contracts.purpose: Preview contract for supervised AI_OS queue routing. Queue records are routing evidence only and do not authorize execution.

contracts.name: AIOS_RUNTIME_STATE_BUNDLE.v1
contracts.purpose: Read-only runtime aggregation contract for AI_OS orchestration evidence. Describes generated evidence only and does not grant mutation authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_PLANNER_PROMPT_PREVIEW.v1
contracts.purpose: Preview-only planner prompt schema for AI_OS Stage 2. Describes inert planner recommendations only with no runtime or execution authority.

contracts.name: AIOS_VALIDATOR_CONFIDENCE.v1
contracts.purpose: Read-only validator confidence evidence for AI_OS runtime and auto-git decisions.

contracts.name: AIOS_AUTO_GIT_POLICY_DECISION.v1
contracts.purpose: Read-only decision contract for future safe auto commit, push, and merge eligibility. Does not authorize execution.

contracts.name: AIOS_AUTONOMY_BRIDGE_STATE.v1
contracts.purpose: Dashboard-safe bridge state for Relay input, Night Supervisor review, Morning Digest output, and next safe action visibility. Evidence only.

contracts.name: AIOS_NIGHT_SUPERVISOR_APPROVAL_QUEUE.v1
contracts.purpose: Read-only Night Supervisor projection over local Relay approval evidence.
